scripts.dev: pnpm run write-config && wrangler dev --config wrangler.generated.jsonc
scripts.deploy: pnpm run write-config && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated.jsonc --minify
scripts.d1:schema:local: pnpm run write-config && wrangler d1 execute twikoo --local --file=./node_modules/twikoo-cloudflare/schema.sql --config wrangler.generated.jsonc
scripts.d1:schema:remote: pnpm run write-config && wrangler d1 execute twikoo --remote --file=./node_modules/twikoo-cloudflare/schema.sql --config wrangler.generated.jsonc
